metadata.description: Paper metadata as inline JSON input (object/string/bibtex-like text are all acceptable).

input_tags.description: Optional raw tags to normalize, provided as inline input. Missing input_tags is treated as an empty array.

valid_tags.description: Optional absolute path to controlled vocabulary file injected by Strict Key-Matching from uploads/valid_tags. When absent, tag-regulator runs in pure inference mode.

digest_markdown.description: Optional absolute path to a paper digest markdown file injected from uploads/digest_markdown.
